rurality 0.1.1
  • Get started
  • Reference
  • Changelog

Package index

Lookup

Retrieve rurality scores, RUCC, and RUCA codes by FIPS or ZIP.

get_rurality()
Look Up Rurality Data by FIPS Code
get_rucc()
Get RUCC Code for a County
get_ruca()
Look Up RUCA Code by ZIP Code
rurality_score()
Get Rurality Score for a County
classify_rurality()
Classify a Rurality Score

Merge

Attach rurality variables to an existing data frame.

add_rurality()
Merge Rurality Data onto a Data Frame

Data

county_rurality
County-Level Rurality Data for the United States
ruca_codes
RUCA Code Data for U.S. ZIP Codes
